confirmed_issues.description: The published EA payload contract (task specification, CLAUDE.md) uses 'quote_time' for the tick timestamp and 'candles' (array) for candle data. The current handler reads only 'timestamp' and 'candle'/'candle_m15' (single objects). The MQL5 EA itself sends 'timestamp', so EA→backend works. However, external callers or future EA updates using the documented contract will receive silent failures: quote_time is ignored (staleness check skipped), and a candles array is not processed.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: The documented public REST contract diverged from the internal field names during Phase 0 development. No alias mapping was added.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Add 'quote_time' as a fallback alias for 'timestamp' in the post_ea_market_stream handler. Add 'candles' array shim: if candles[] is present and candle is absent, use candles[0] as the M1 candle object. Update the docblock to reflect both formats. Add regression tests.

confirmed_issues.description: When a payload uses 'quote_time' instead of 'timestamp', the audit log entry for 'ea.market_stream.ingested' records 'timestamp' => null even though the actual timestamp was provided as 'quote_time'. This makes audit trail debugging harder.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: The audit call at the end of post_ea_market_stream uses $payload['timestamp'] ?? null hardcoded rather than the resolved timestamp variable.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Use the resolved $timestamp_raw variable (quote_time ?? timestamp) in the audit entry.

confirmed_issues.description: The PHP docblock for post_ea_market_stream (lines 1779-1799) still documents the old payload format with 'timestamp' as the field name and 'candle' as a single object. It does not document 'quote_time', 'source', 'server_time', or the 'candles' array format.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Docblock not updated when the public contract was specified.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Update docblock to document both the legacy format (timestamp/candle/candle_m15) and the canonical format (quote_time/source/server_time/candles array).

confirmed_issues.description: EA authentication is fully correct. X-EA-API-Key header (plus aliases) is read, hash_equals is used, SMC_SF_EA_API_KEY constant/env is checked, missing token returns 401, unconfigured secret returns 503, invalid token returns 403, missing user_id returns 400, invalid user_id returns 403, wp_set_current_user is called before returning true. No action required.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: N/A — this is a PASS finding

confirmed_issues.description: Stale data rejection is correctly implemented at 300s hard-reject (HTTP 422), 120s drift warning. OHLC guard, epoch timestamp guard, is_finite(bid/ask) guard, and negative volume clamp are all present and tested by regression tests. No action required.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: N/A — this is a PASS finding

confirmed_issues.description: Backend remains the single source of truth. Dashboard reads from /snapshot, /live-signals, /ladders - all backend-authoritative. Frontend normalizes numeric fields but does not compute signals. FreshnessBadge uses age_sec from backend. VerdictBadge gates on backend is_live flag. No stale-data qualification of signals detected.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: N/A — this is a PASS finding

confirmed_issues.description: The equity index session fix is correctly implemented in both layers: (1) mt5/MarketDataEngine.mqh - IsEquityIndexSymbol() + IsEquitySessionOpen() override freshness to CLOSED and use TimeCurrent() as push timestamp during off-hours. (2) smc-superfib-sniper.php - is_equity_index_off_session() excludes NAS100/US30 from stale feed check during their off-session hours, with DST-aware logic. Code fix merged in PR #170/#171. Live validation soak has NOT yet been run.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Run 4-hour validation soak covering at least one US equity session (09:30-16:00 ET)

confirmed_issues.description: SymbolNormalizer.mqh correctly includes AddAlias('GOLD', 'XAUUSD') plus aliases for GOLD.PRO etc. The PHP plugin's map_symbol_aliases() also maps 'GOLD' to 'XAUUSD'. Code fix merged in PR #170. EA restart and 7.5h M15 candle accumulation have not yet been confirmed.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: EA restart required; wait 7.5h (30 x 15min bars) for XAUUSD candle-history readiness gate to pass
